missing-measurements.message: One or more opening measurements are missing or invalid.
missing-measurements.recommendation: Enter bottom, center, and top widths plus left, center, and right heights.

missing-layout.message: Rows and columns must be at least 1.
missing-layout.recommendation: Set a positive row and column count.

impossible-geometry.message: The selected geometry cannot be generated.
impossible-geometry.recommendation: Check opening dimensions and door selection.

door-too-wide.message: The selected door package is too wide for the measured opening.
door-too-wide.recommendation: Increase the opening width, reduce the door package, or revise the layout.

door-too-tall.message: The selected door height exceeds available entrance height.
door-too-tall.recommendation: Verify the opening height or use a shorter entrance package.

ada-clear-width.message: Estimated clear opening may not satisfy common accessible clear width expectations.
ada-clear-width.recommendation: Verify actual clear width, hinge type, stop, and local accessibility requirements.

egress-swing.message: Inswing selected; egress direction may need review.
egress-swing.recommendation: Confirm occupancy, egress path, and existing-building allowances.

unsupported-hinge.message: Selected hinge type is not supported by the active entrance rule pack.
unsupported-hinge.recommendation: Choose a supported hinge type or update the entrance rule pack.

hardware-compatibility.message: Selected hardware may not match the selected entrance type.
hardware-compatibility.recommendation: Review the entrance hardware notes before issuing the drawing package.

short-transom.message: Remaining height exists above the door but no transom was generated.
short-transom.recommendation: Review row count and transom settings.

unsupported-layout.message: Door elevation has remaining width but not enough sidelite columns to model it cleanly.
unsupported-layout.recommendation: Use at least two columns for door elevations, and three columns for centered sidelites.

opening-too-wide.message: Opening width exceeds the simple V1 rule-pack advisory limit.
opening-too-wide.recommendation: Review mullion spacing, expansion needs, and approved shop drawing details.

opening-too-tall.message: Opening height exceeds the simple V1 rule-pack advisory limit.
opening-too-tall.recommendation: Review structural and product limitations outside this field drawing tool.

expansion-vertical-advisory.message: Wide elevation may require expansion vertical review.
expansion-vertical-advisory.recommendation: Treat this as an advisory only; do not apply expansion logic to stack assembly without approved details.

stack-expansion-advisory.message: Stack assembly selected; expansion vertical assumptions should not be applied automatically.
stack-expansion-advisory.recommendation: Use approved stack assembly details for expansion and movement conditions.

existing-building-context.recommendation: Verify existing substrates, floor conditions, egress, and accessibility constraints.

safety-glazing.message: One or more lites are likely safety glazing locations.
safety-glazing.recommendation: Confirm tempered or laminated safety glazing requirements before ordering glass.
